name: io.github.grzgrzgrz3/pingwa
title: pingwa
description: WhatsApp notifications for AI agents with zero setup — no Meta account, no templates: text 'join', get an API key, send in 60 seconds. Two-way human-in-the-loop: ask with tap-to-answer buttons, check_replies. Official Meta Cloud API — won't ban your number.

environmentVariables.name: PINGWA_KEY
environmentVariables.description: pingwa API key (send 'join' on WhatsApp to the service number — see https://pingwa.dev)
